nodes.name: Granola & Milk — Garden Veg Bowl
nodes.description: name: Granola & Milk — Garden Veg Bowl | short_description: A quick granola, milk, and banana bowl offering energy, calcium, potassium, and fiber; customizable with higher-protein milk or added vegeta
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Granola & Milk — Garden Veg Bowl - name: Granola & Milk — Garden Veg Bowl | short_description: A quick granola, milk, and banana bowl offering energy, calcium, potassium, and fiber; customizable with higher-protein milk or added vegetables/fruits. | meal_suggestion: To boost protein, use higher-protein milk or add Greek yogurt. For more vegetables, top with a handful of spinach or berries to enhance fiber and micronutrients. | nutrition_note: Carb-rich bowl with protein and calcium from milk; banana adds potassium and fiber. Monitor added sugars in granola; choose unsweetened or lower-sugar varieties and watch portion size.

nodes.name: Avocado Toast — Smoky Skillet
nodes.description: name: Avocado Toast — Smoky Skillet | short_description: Whole-grain avocado toast with lemon and egg, smoky skillet-inspired. | meal_suggestion: Toast the bread; mash avocado with a squeeze of lemon;
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Avocado Toast — Smoky Skillet - name: Avocado Toast — Smoky Skillet | short_description: Whole-grain avocado toast with lemon and egg, smoky skillet-inspired. | meal_suggestion: Toast the bread; mash avocado with a squeeze of lemon; spread on toast; top with a fried or poached egg. Optional: a pinch of smoked paprika to add smoky flavor. | nutrition_note: Balanced mix: complex carbs and fiber from whole-grain bread; healthy fats from avocado; high-quality protein from egg; lemon adds vitamin C. Helps with satiety and steady energy. Contains gluten and eggs.

nodes.name: Smoothie — Berry Boost Skillet
nodes.description: name: Smoothie — Berry Boost Skillet | short_description: Creamy banana-peanut butter oat smoothie with balanced carbs, protein, and fats. | meal_suggestion: Blend banana, milk, peanut butter, and oat
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Smoothie — Berry Boost Skillet - name: Smoothie — Berry Boost Skillet | short_description: Creamy banana-peanut butter oat smoothie with balanced carbs, protein, and fats. | meal_suggestion: Blend banana, milk, peanut butter, and oats until smooth for a creamy drink; add ice for a cooler consistency. Optional toppings: sliced banana, berries, or a sprinkle of extra oats. | nutrition_note: Protein- and fiber-rich smoothie from banana, oats, peanut butter, and milk; provides potassium and healthy fats. Use unsweetened milk to limit sugar, and add berries for extra antioxidants if desired.
